Race: ALL

Race: ALL

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20

▲ Page top
A use I read once
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2002 at 9:52 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757719213
4 posts
According to an old smithing manual that I have, the Flawless Aquamarine is used for smithing an Enchanted Seafarer's Harpoon. The recipe listed is: medium quality sheet of metal(not folded) + spear head mold +oak shaft+sea temper + flawless aquamarine. Here is a link to the finished product:

http://www.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=5698

Its a 6 26 weapon with +2 dex and +3svc. In the velious/Luclin era, pretty much useless.

Arizn Gaidheal 49th ranger of Tunare
▲ Page top
Must drop off all mid level mobs
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2002 at 11:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
